542812.displayName: CAFE Olé by H-E-B Medium Roast Cinnamon Hazelnut Ground Coffee- Trial Size
542812.productDescription:
Venture out and try a new kind of ground coffee with this trial-sized sampler of CAFE Olé by H-E-B Cinnamon Hazelnut. Medium-bodied, it offers the flavor of cinnamon and German hazelnuts in every sip. Makes 1 pot of coffee.

• Ground coffee
• Medium roast
• Cinnamon and hazelnut flavor
• 100% Arabica coffee

About CAFE Olé by H-E-B
Launched in 1997, CAFE Olé by H-E-B coffee is available in a variety of flavors and roasts. We begin with high quality Arabica beans harvested from legendary coffee-growing regions throughout the world. They are then roasted with precision and care to bring the artisan difference to your home. Enjoy exploring the complete collection of single cup, bagged ground, bulk beans and cold brew coffee.

583162.displayName: CAFE Olé by H-E-B Texas Pecan Medium Roast Ground Coffee
583162.productDescription:
Ground from 100% Arabica beans, CAFE Olé by H-E-B Texas Pecan coffee is medium-bodied and brimming with the flavor of caramel and pecans. An aromatic treat as it brews, this medium roast blend is perfect for making a big pot or just a single cup with a reusable coffee pod filter.

• One 12 oz bag of ground coffee
• Medium Roast and medium bodied
• Texas Pecan: Creamy caramel and Texas pecan flavors
• 100% Arabica Coffee

Made to Be a Texas Favorite
Many H-E-B brand products are so unique, they could only come from H-E-B — and this is one of them! It’s specially made for Texas tastes and lifestyles, whether it’s the thoughtfully sourced ingredients, the distinctive flavor or the captivating scent. And as always, if it’s got our name on it, you have our word — that’s a 100% guarantee promise!

About CAFE Olé by H-E-B
Launched in 1997, CAFE Olé by H-E-B coffee is available in a variety of flavors and roasts. We begin with high quality Arabica beans harvested from legendary coffee-growing regions throughout the world. They are then roasted with precision and care to bring the artisan difference to your home. Enjoy exploring the complete collection of single cup, bagged ground, bulk beans and cold brew coffee.

2337503.displayName: CAFE Olé by H-E-B Houston Blend Medium Roast Ground Coffee
2337503.productDescription:
Mornings are much easier when you brew a pot of CAFE Olé by H-E-B Houston Blend coffee. Ground from 100% Arabica coffee beans, this medium-bodied variety offers the eye-opening taste and aroma of pecan praline and coconut.

• One 12 oz bag of ground coffee
• Medium Roast and medium bodied
• Houston Blend: Pecan praline and coconut flavors
• 100% Arabica Coffee
